# AgentChat Hub

> Your agents, your rules. One app for every AI agent you'll ever use.

Every AI agent needs its own app. Not anymore. AgentChat Hub lets you connect to any A2A-compatible AI agent by pasting a URL — no middleman, no account, no tracking. Paste an endpoint, start chatting in seconds. Native on iPhone, iPad, Mac, and Apple Vision Pro. Free forever.

## Key facts

- **Price:** Free. No subscription, no in-app purchases, no freemium gate.
- **Platforms:** iPhone (iOS 15.1+), iPad, Mac (macOS 12+), Apple Vision Pro (visionOS 1.0+). Android coming soon.
- **Protocol:** A2A (Agent-to-Agent) — the open standard for AI agent communication
- **Privacy:** No backend, no telemetry, no analytics. Conversations stored on-device only.
- **App Store:** https://apps.apple.com/us/app/agentchat-hub/id6760924304
- **Version:** 1.1
- **Developer:** Ananya Banerjee
- **Copyright:** © 2026 Ananya Banerjee. All rights reserved.

## What is the A2A protocol?

A2A (Agent-to-Agent) is the open standard for AI agent communication — an interoperability protocol that lets AI agents talk across platforms using a standard HTTP interface. Any service that exposes an A2A endpoint and publishes a discovery file at `/.well-known/agent.json` is automatically compatible with AgentChat Hub. There is no curated marketplace — the open web is the directory.

## Features

- **Live streaming:** Every response arrives token-by-token over SSE. You watch the agent reason in real time — not a loading spinner followed by a wall of text.
- **Connect by URL:** Paste an endpoint, the app reads the Agent Card. No SDK, no API key, no setup ritual.
- **Multi-agent roster:** Add unlimited agents, organize into groups and tabs, switch between them like contacts.
- **Rich attachments:** Send photos, images, and files inline. Multi-modal from day one.
- **Native everywhere:** One native binary per platform — not a web view. Platform idioms, system fonts, keyboard shortcuts all work as expected.

## Who is it for?

- **Developers building A2A agents** — test and demo your agent instantly without building a frontend. Ship faster, iterate in real time.
- **Teams** — give your team a native mobile client for internal AI assistants, no bespoke frontend required.
- **Self-hosters** — wrap a local LLM in an A2A endpoint and chat from your phone.
- **Everyone** — a private, clean messenger for the AI agents you actually choose. No logins, no data collection, no subscription walls.

## FAQ

**Q: Every AI agent needs its own app — does AgentChat Hub solve that?**
Yes. AgentChat Hub is one app that connects to any A2A-compatible agent via URL. No per-agent installs, no separate accounts.

**Q: Do I need to build anything to use it?**
No. Paste any A2A-compatible agent endpoint URL and start chatting. No SDK, no API key, no frontend to build.

**Q: What AI agents work with AgentChat Hub?**
Any agent implementing the A2A spec — LangChain, CrewAI, custom Python/Node.js servers, locally-run models, internal company agents. If it publishes an Agent Card at /.well-known/agent.json, AgentChat Hub connects to it.

**Q: Which agents can I connect to?**
Any agent implementing the A2A specification — self-built, internal company agents, or third-party services exposing a standard A2A endpoint. There is no curated marketplace. The open web is the directory.

**Q: Does AgentChat Hub collect any data?**
No. No backend, no telemetry, no analytics. Messages travel directly from your device to your chosen agent. Your conversations are stored on-device and nowhere else.

**Q: Is it really free?**
Yes. No subscription, no in-app purchases, no freemium gate. You pay the agent providers you connect to directly — that is between you and them.

**Q: What platforms does it run on?**
iPhone, iPad, Mac, and Apple Vision Pro. Native binary on each — not a web view or cross-platform wrapper. Android coming soon.

**Q: Is it available on Android?**
Not yet — but Android is coming soon. AgentChat Hub is currently available on iPhone, iPad, Mac, and Vision Pro.

## Links

- Website: https://agent-chat-hub.com/
- App Store: https://apps.apple.com/us/app/agentchat-hub/id6760924304
